creator: rsecor@seqlogic.com
text:
Version 5.4.20 of VPOPMail has been out for some time.
Many of us in the QMail/VPOPMail community that use FreeBSD have tried E-Mailing the maintainer of the port and none of us has received any responses.
Please update the port.
Thanks.

Fix: 

Update the port to the newest release.
